subject: Product Management
title: Platform vs Product
description: Learn Platform vs Product in one minute.

hook.text: Products create value. Platforms let others create value. That distinction has determined the biggest winners in tech.

buildup.text: Apple's iPhone became a platform with the App Store. Facebook became a platform with its developer API.

discovery.text: Platforms win because they scale beyond the company's own capacity — millions of developers build on top of you.

twist.text: But platform power creates dependency. When Facebook changed its API, entire companies built on it collapsed overnight.

climax.text: The product decision to become a platform is irreversible. It creates enormous value — and enormous responsibility.

punchline.text: Build a product to serve users. Build a platform to serve builders.

quiz.question: What is the key difference between a product and a platform?
options: Products create value directly; platforms let others create value on top of them
Products are for consumers; platforms are for businesses
